response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_time : time
ATTR arrival_time : time
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_id
ATTR city_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK airplane_id
ATTR airplane_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusHistory
PK flight_id, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_id
REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1 : FK=city_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL FlightStatusHistory -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusHistory -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
